title: Initial Katanas
description: Adds some fancy and ancient katanas to the game.
body:
# **This Resourcepack requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)!**

You can get these old as the universe itself katanas by renaming either a diamond sword or a netherite sword into _Bloody Grief_, _Faint Quasar_ or _Algid Gleam_ !

It is that simple and powerful!
